visual_description: A medium shot shows a group of men in what appears to be an investigation briefing room. In the foreground, a man in a light blue, short-sleeved shirt looks down with a concerned expression. Behind him, another man in a similar shirt stands with his hands clasped. To the left, a whiteboard covered in notes and photos is visible. On the right, several framed photos with blue-tinted images are displayed on an easel. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The camera pans slightly to the left, revealing more of the room. A man in a dark suit and white shirt stands in the center, looking forward with a serious expression. To his left, another man in a suit is partially visible. The whiteboard and photos remain in the background. The camera pans further left, focusing on a man in a dark jacket over a light blue shirt. He looks intently forward with a worried expression. Other people, including a woman in a white shirt, are visible in the background, all looking in the same direction. The "风行网" text is still present.
